# Packrift Procurement Readiness Index

Public URL: https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/

This Packrift-owned public data asset summarizes 1200 packaging SKUs for buyer and AI-agent procurement readiness. It includes SKU, product type, availability, GTIN presence, public product URL, price band, shipping weight band, and a simple readiness score. Internal commercial fields are excluded.

Key files:
- https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/data/readiness-index.json
- https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/data/readiness-index.jsonl
- https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/data/readiness-index.csv
- https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/metadata.json
- https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/openapi.json
- https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/.well-known/agent-manifest.json
